synopsis.value: Mok Sol-Hee (Kim So-Hyun) has a special ability that allows her to distinguish whether people are lying or not. She hates her ability and views it as a curse. Because of her special ability, she is unable to trust anyone. Mok Sol-Hee gets involved with a murder suspect (Minhyun) who insists he is innocent, but nobody believes him.

value.characterName: Cassandra / Yoon Ye Seul [Tarot magician / Barista]
So Bo Ro [Owner of Yeonseo Bakery]
